flags.name: Mapei Mapefer 1K
flags.evidence: Mapefer 1K is a single-component, polymer-modified CEMENTITIOUS anti-corrosion primer with inhibitors (EN 1504-7), not an epoxy zinc-rich primer; it is already correctly listed under Rebar Primers Inhibitors so this entry is a misplaced duplicate. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

flags.name: SikaTop Armatec 110 EpoCem
flags.evidence: SikaTop Armatec-110 EpoCem is a 3-component cementitious-epoxy bonding primer / reinforcement corrosion protection coating (EN 1504-7) with corrosion inhibitor, NOT a zinc-rich primer; it is already correctly listed under Rebar Primers Inhibitors so this entry is a misplaced duplicate. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/steel-reinforcmentprimers/sikatop-armatec-110epocem.html

flags.name: Mapei Mapefer
flags.evidence: Mapefer / Mapefer 1K is a cementitious applied REBAR coating (EN 1504-7 reinforcement corrosion protection), not a surface-applied or migrating corrosion inhibitor (MCI) for concrete; belongs with rebar primers/coatings. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

flags.name: Mapei Mapefox EW
flags.evidence: No 'Mapefox EW' product exists in Mapei's Australian range or global catalogue; Mapei's AU pure-epoxy chemical anchor for rebar/threaded rod is Mapefix EP 100 (the line is 'Mapefix', not 'Mapefox'). Likely a wrong/fabricated name. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/9

recommendations.name: Sika Armatec-10 ZR
recommendations.reason: Genuine Sika single-component zinc-rich rebar primer, fills the gap left when the two misplaced cementitious coatings are removed from this subcategory. https://usa.sika.com/en/construction/repair-protection/corrosion-protection/rebar-coatings/sika-armatec-10zr.html

recommendations.name: Sika Armatec 1C
recommendations.type: 1-component cementitious bonding primer / rebar corrosion protection
recommendations.reason: Current Sika 1-component cementitious bonding primer and reinforcement corrosion protection coating; common AU alternative to the 3-component SikaTop Armatec-110 EpoCem. https://usa.sika.com/en/construction/repair-protection/corrosion-protection/rebar-coatings/sika-armatec-1c.html

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapefix EP 100
recommendations.type: pure epoxy chemical anchor (rebar / threaded rod)
recommendations.reason: Correct, real Mapei AU pure-epoxy chemical anchor (ETA / seismic C1-C2, rebar Ø8-Ø40) replacing the non-existent 'Mapefox EW'. https://cdnmedia.mapei.com/docs/librariesprovider8/products-documents/1_1_05809_mapefix-ep-100_en_ccdc260dc89843f68a849f86b383a9d7.pdf

recommendations.name: Sika FerroGard-901
recommendations.reason: Adds the integral/admixture MCI counterpart to the surface-applied FerroGard-903+ already listed; common AU Sika corrosion-inhibitor pairing. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/corrosion-inhibitorssacrificialanodes.html

recommendations.name: Vector Galvashield XP2
recommendations.type: embedded zinc galvanic discrete anode (higher output)
recommendations.reason: Higher-output discrete galvanic anode (twice the current of XPT), distributed in AU by Parchem/Fosroc; complements the base Galvashield XP entry. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/vector-galvashield-xp

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapegrout T40
recommendations.reason: Current AU Mapegrout structural repair mortar; broadens the Mapei range beyond Mapegrout Thixotropic. https://adheseal.com.au/products/mapegrout-t40
